channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Another Reform candidate resigns after vetting failure – and councils are forced to pick up the bill
item.description: Another Reform candidate resigns after vetting failure – and councils are forced to pick up the bill

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham given boost in bid to return as MP and Streeting to give first speech since resigning
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham given boost in bid to return as MP and Streeting to give first speech since resigning

item.title: i Politics: 'I support Reform, but will vote Burnham to get rid of Starmer'
item.description: 'I support Reform, but will vote Burnham to get rid of Starmer'

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Restore UK are standing in Makerfield which will help Burnham by pulling a few votes away from Reform. Will be an interesting test if how split the right vote is.
item.description: Restore UK are standing in Makerfield which will help Burnham by pulling a few votes away from Reform. Will be an interesting test if how split the right vote is.

item.title: The Times: Why big business fears ‘Raynernomics’ — and Andy Burnham - The Times
item.description: Why big business fears ‘Raynernomics’ — and Andy Burnham - The Times

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting ally dismisses ‘arrogant’ talk of Burnham coronation
item.description: Streeting ally dismisses ‘arrogant’ talk of Burnham coronation

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer
item.description: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer

item.title: The Telegraph: What an Andy Burnham premiership would look like - The Telegraph
item.description: What an Andy Burnham premiership would look like - The Telegraph

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: My post on why prime ministers keep failing.
And three big things that the next PM can change that will make their job easier.
samf.substack.com/p/why-do-pri...
item.description:
My post on why prime ministers keep failing.
And three big things that the next PM can change that will make their job easier.
samf.substack.com/p/why-do-pri...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.
item.description: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.
